title: Cloud Operations Engineer - Technology IT
description:
Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Noida
   

  

**About Signant Health**
 At Signant Health, we help bring life\\-changing treatments to patients faster. We are a global evidence generation company that supports clinical trials with smart technology, scientific expertise, and hands\\-on operational support — so better data leads to better decisions in healthcare. We embrace AI and advanced technologies to enhance every aspect of what we do, from data analysis to operational efficiency.
   

  

 Our teams work at the intersection of science, technology, and patient experience, delivering digital solutions powered by AI innovation that make clinical trials more efficient, more accurate, and more accessible around the world. Trusted by leading pharmaceutical companies and CROs, our platforms and services support studies across more than 90 countries and have contributed to hundreds of new drug approvals.
   

  

 If you are motivated by meaningful work, global impact, and innovation in clinical research and digital health — including the opportunity to work with cutting\\-edge AI technologies — you will find purpose and opportunity at Signant Health.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Support the deployment, configuration, and maintenance of cloud infrastructure and application services to ensure customer environments are highly available, scalable, and reliable. Collaborate with development, release, and application teams to deliver seamless infrastructure operations and continuous improvement.
   

  

 This role exists to maintain operational stability, implement automation for repetitive tasks, and grow technical expertise in cloud operations and modern infrastructure practices.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Deploy and configure servers and application software across environments using automation scripts and tools.
* Troubleshoot infrastructure and application issues to identify root causes and implement workarounds and permanent resolutions.
* Provide escalation support for complex incidents escalated from the Service Delivery team, ensuring timely resolution and clear communication.
* Utilize and improve existing tools and utilities to streamline troubleshooting and operational processes.
* Ensure stability and availability of application components running on Azure cloud infrastructure.
* Monitor infrastructure costs and identify opportunities to right\\-size servers and services for cost optimization.
* Respond to monitoring alerts of application instability, investigate root causes, and implement corrective actions.
* Set up and configure monitoring, logging, and alerting systems to provide operational visibility.
* Leverage AI\\-assisted tools to accelerate troubleshooting and improve operational efficiency.
* Create and maintain technical documentation for systems, processes, and troubleshooting procedures that support both Cloud Operations and Service Delivery teams.


**Attributes We Value**
 We prioritize mindset and behaviors over tenure. The following attributes are essential to success in this role:
   

  

**Attribute**
**What This Looks Like**
**Agility**
 Adapts quickly to changing priorities, tools, and technologies;
   

  

 comfortable with ambiguity and shifting requirements.
   

  

**Resilience**
 Maintains composure during outages and high\\-pressure incidents; learns from failures with a focus on solutions; recovers and improves.
   

  

**Curiosity**
 Actively seeks to understand new systems and improve existing ones; questions assumptions constructively; explore root causes.
   

  

**Ownership Mindset**
 Takes responsibility for assigned tasks and follows through to completion; proactively addresses issues before escalation.
   

  

**Learning Velocity**
 Rapidly acquires proficiency in unfamiliar systems and technologies; stays current with cloud and automation practices.
   

  

**Collaboration**
 Works effectively across teams; communicates clearly during incidents; provides backup support to colleagues.
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
 We prioritize mindset and behaviors over tenure. The following attributes are essential to success in this role.
   

  

**Foundational Skills**
* Problem\\-Solving: able to systematically diagnose issues, identify root causes, and implement effective solutions.
* Communication Under Pressure: can clearly articulate technical issues to diverse stakeholders during incidents.
* Independent Execution: capable of working autonomously while knowing when to escalate or seek input.
* Process Improvement: identifies inefficiencies and contributes improvements to operational workflows.
* Team Collaboration: works effectively in a team\\-oriented environment; provides backup support and maintains positive working relationships across the Service Delivery and Cloud Operations teams.


**Desired Qualifications:
 **Core Technical Capabilities****
 These core technical capabilities form the baseline for effectiveness in this role:
   

  

**Azure Cloud Platform**
* Provision, configure, and manage infrastructure in Azure
* Understanding of Azure services: compute, storage, networking


**Infrastructure Automation**
* PowerShell scripting for deployment and operational tasks
* n8n workflow automation for process improvements
* ARM templates for infrastructure provisioning


**Containerization \\& Configuration Management**
* Basic understanding of container concepts and Kubernetes
* Configuration management tools (e.g., Ansible)


**AI\\-Assisted Operations**
* Generative AI tools for troubleshooting and documentation
* AI\\-powered support platforms for operational efficiency


**Operating Systems \\& Web Servers**
* Linux and/or Windows server administration
* Web server configuration and troubleshooting (IIS, Apache, Tomcat, or similar)


**Database Fundamentals**
* Basic SQL Server administration and connectivity troubleshooting
* Ability to write simple queries and diagnose database issues


**Monitoring \\& Observability**
* Set up, configure, and respond to monitoring and alerting systems
* Basic performance troubleshooting and log analysis


**What Success Looks Like**
**First 90 days**
* Independently resolve standard incidents with minimal escalation.
* Demonstrate proficiency with core Azure services and deployment processes.
* Effectively use monitoring tools and respond to alerts appropriately.
* Build collaborative relationships with the Service Delivery team and understand common escalation patterns.


**First 6 months**
* Contribute automation (a PowerShell script, n8n workflow, or AI\\-assisted process) that measurably improves deployment reliability or reduces manual toil.
* Take ownership of a specific infrastructure component or service area.
* Build strong working relationships across development, release, operations, and Service Delivery teams.
* Effectively resolve escalated tickets with clear communication and knowledge transfer.


**First year**
* Lead or significantly contribute to an optimization or automation initiative.
* Demonstrate consistent reliability in incident response and infrastructure operations.
* Mentor newer team members and share knowledge through documentation or training.
* Identify patterns in escalated tickets and create solutions that reduce future escalations.


**Career Pathways**
 This role can evolve into:
   

  

* Senior Cloud Operations Engineer
* Lead Cloud Operations Engineer
* Cloud Operations Architect
* Lead Cloud Operations Architect
* Manager, Infrastructure \\& Operations


 A Note on Experience
   

  

 We do not mandate specific years of experience or formal degree requirements. We value demonstrated capability, learning agility, and the right mindset over credentials. If you can show you have the skills and attributes described above—through work history, personal projects, certifications, or other means—we encourage you to apply
   

  

**Why Signant Health?**
 At Signant Health, your work has real impact. Everything we build, support, and deliver helps advance clinical research and bring new treatments to patients faster — improving lives around the world. Our teams combine science, technology, and operational expertise to solve complex clinical trial challenges, and every role contributes to that mission.
   

  

 We offer a collaborative, global environment where you can grow your career while working alongside experts across clinical, technology, data, and operations, with opportunities to learn, take ownership, and drive meaningful innovation — not just maintain the status quo.
   

  

 If you are looking for purpose\\-driven work, smart colleagues, and the opportunity to help shape the future of clinical research and digital health, Signant Health is the place to do it.
   

  

 At Signant Health, accepting difference isn't enough — we celebrate it, we support it, and we nurture it for the benefit of our team members, our clients, and our community. We are proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer, committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, or veteran status. Prior to their start date, all candidates are required to be verified through a thorough background check and identity verification to confirm eligibility for employment.

title: IT Specialist Cloud Services, Global (Hyderabad, India)
description:
The IT Specialist Cloud Services, Global, is responsible for supporting the delivery, optimization, and operational stability of the company’s cloud and on\\-premises data centre infrastructures. This role encompasses designing, implementing, maintaining, and optimizing compute, storage, networking, and platform services to ensure they are secure, highly available, cost\\-effective, and in line with business and technology strategies. Additionally, the position contributes to executing the global cloud and data centre strategy by implementing cloud solutions, supporting ongoing operations, ensuring platform reliability, and collaborating with both global and regional IT teams.
 



  





 The IT specialist brings deep technical expertise across hybrid cloud environments, acting as a subject\\-matter expert for cloud platforms (such as Azure and AWS) and data centre technologies to ensure seamless integration, reliable operations, and compliance with security standards. This role oversees the technical execution and daily operations of assigned IT services supporting migrations, automation, capacity planning, performance optimization, cost optimization, and security improvements while managing incidents, problems, changes, and service requests. The IT specialist monitors technical performance supporting continuous service improvement, enhancing security and compliance through engineering and automation initiatives.
 



  





 Key stakeholders for the IT Specialist include service owners, service managers, process managers, provider managers, regional delivery leads, other IT functions (i.e., SD, I\\&A, and IT security), and external partners to deliver consistent and effective Global IT services
 



  





  





**Hybrid Cloud Operations** 



* Support delivery, configuration, and ongoing operations of a hybrid cloud environment that integrates on\\-premises data center infrastructure (private cloud) with public cloud services such as Azure \\& AWS.
* Support the design, deployment, and maintenance of cloud services across Azure, AWS, or other enterprise cloud platforms.
* Manage virtual machines, storage, networking, security groups, and resource configurations.
* Optimize cloud consumption and costs through governance, tagging, rightsizing, and automation.
* Implement and maintain cloud backup, disaster recovery, and support for business continuity.
* Oversee on‑premises compute, storage, and network environments (VMware, Hyper‑V, SAN/NAS, etc.).
* Monitor data center capacity, performance, and health to maintain high availability.
* Manage physical infrastructure where applicable: racks, power, cooling, cabling, hardware lifecycle.
* Coordinate upgrades, patching, firmware updates, and lifecycle refresh activities.
* Support hybrid architectures, ensuring seamless integration between cloud and on‑prem systems.
* Manage hybrid cloud\\-related connectivity solutions (VPN, ExpressRoute, SD‑WAN) and hybrid identity.
* Implement hybrid management tools (e.g., Azure Arc, VMware Cloud, monitoring platforms).
* Monitor health, performance, and utilization of metrics for computing, storage, backup, and network systems in premise data centers, proactively identifying risks or opportunities for improvement.
* Maintain and improve operational runbooks, deployment procedures, and platform documentation to ensure accuracy and repeatability.
* Conduct technical troubleshooting and deep\\-dive root cause analysis for incidents affecting either cloud services or on\\-premises infrastructure, ensuring rapid and coordinated recovery.
* Understanding cloud cost drivers and ability to perform cost analysis and optimization.



  





  





**Hybrid Cloud Projects \\& Change Implementation** 



* Contribute to infrastructure modernization initiatives—including cloud migrations, datacenter consolidation, platform refresh cycles, and hybrid cloud implementations
* Implement and monitor approved changes across cloud and data center platforms in alignment with architecture designs and security/compliance requirements.
* Partner with architects and engineering teams to validate solution designs, identify operational considerations, and support successful deployment.
* Participate in automation and orchestration initiatives that reduce manual effort and improve consistency across hybrid environments
* Assist with environment testing, pilot deployments, and transition to operations activities for new or enhanced services.



  





  





**Hybrid Cloud Governance, Security \\& Compliance** 



* Apply global governance frameworks, security baselines, and configuration standards consistently across cloud and on\\-premise platforms.
* Support security assessments, vulnerability remediation, patch compliance tracking, and infrastructure hardening activities in both cloud and physical data center environments.
* Work with Security GRC to enforce identity, access controls, logging/monitoring requirements, and audit readiness across hybrid infrastructure.
* Ensure adherence to corporate policies related to data protection, backup retention, infrastructure segmentation, and privileged access.



  





  





**Stakeholder \\& Partner Collaboration** 



* Collaborate with regional IT teams, application owners, and service managers to understand requirements and deliver infrastructure services that meet business needs.
* Coordinate with global managed service providers, cloud vendors, and data center partners to resolve complex infrastructure issues and maintain service stability.
* Provide insights into hybrid infrastructure performance, risks, and opportunities to support planning and decision‑making.
* Communicate technical topics clearly to stakeholders with varying degrees of technical knowledge.



  





  





**Documentation \\& Knowledge Sharing** 



* Create and maintain updated documentation covering hybrid cloud environments, including topology diagrams, runbooks, SOPs, service catalogs, and recovery procedures.
* Share best practices and technical knowledge with global peers to ensure uniform operations and smooth adoption of new technologies or standards.
* Support onboarding and training by developing knowledge articles and participating in cross regional knowledge transfer sessions.



  





  





**Why work at Olympus?** 




  





 At Olympus, we are committed to fostering a high\\-performing culture, a collaborative environment, and empowering everyone to shine. Our shared values—integrity,
 **empathy, long\\-term view, agility, and unity—form** 
 the foundation of our culture and guide our behavior. These values ensure that our people feel they are making a meaningful difference every single day.
 



  





  





**What we are looking for:** 




  





**Education** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (Equivalent experience may be considered in lieu of formal education.)



  





  





**Professional Experience** 



* Minimum of 3\\+ years' experience in working with cloud technologies and on\\-premise data center environments, including delivery, operations and developing cloud and DC strategy and roadmaps
* Demonstrated experience supporting on‑premise data center services, including server hardware, virtualization platforms (e.g., VMware vSphere, Hyper‑V), storage (SAN/NAS), networking components, backup systems, and monitoring tools.
* Strong understanding of hybrid infrastructure, including how cloud and on‑prem systems integrate (networking, identity, monitoring, backup, and security).
* Experience in cloud and data center migration projects, hardware lifecycle activities, platform refreshes, and infrastructure modernization initiatives.
* Familiarity with cloud service providers, platforms, products and tools in particular Microsoft Azure and AWS
* Certification as an MS Azure or AWS Solutions Architect and/or other Cloud Security Certifications
* Experience in ITIL\\-based service management and operational support.
* Experience managing Global IT Services and working with global service providers.
* Experience delivering complex global infrastructure projects in a multinational environment.



  





  





**Apply Now:** 




  





 To submit your interest in this opportunity, select "Apply for this job."
 



  





  





**Want to know more?** 




  





 Confidential discussions are welcome; contact our TA Partner.
 



  





  





***Olympus is an Equal Opportunity Employer.***




  





 "We are deeply committed to fostering a respectful, fair, and welcoming workplace for all individuals, perspectives, and lifestyles. We believe in fostering a nondiscriminatory, inclusive work environment where everyone feels a sense of belonging, in full compliance with legal standards. Empathy and unity are core to our company culture, empowering employees to contribute fully and flourish. We warmly encourage all who wish to bring their talents to Olympus to apply."

title: Lead Engineer - Target India
description:
**About us:**


Working at Target means helping all families discover the joy of everyday life. We bring that vision to life through our values and culture. Learn more about Target here.

  

As a lead engineer, you serve as the technical anchor for the engineering team that supports a product. You create, own and are responsible for the application architecture that best serves the product in its functional and non\\-functional needs. You identify and drive architectural changes to accelerate feature development or improve the quality of service (or both). You have deep and broad engineering skills and are capable of standing up an architecture in its whole on your own, but you choose to influence a wider team by acting as a “force multiplier”. Core responsibilities of this job are described within this job description. Job duties may change at any time due to business needs.


We are looking for a **Lead Engineer – Kubernetes Platform** with extensive platform engineering experience in designing, building, automating, and operating cloud\\-native platforms. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Kubernetes, cloud\\-native technologies, and platform automation, with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, security, and operational excellence. This role will provide technical leadership in evolving our Kubernetes platform across hybrid cloud and on\\-premises environments.

**Required Skills**

* Strong software development experience in **Go (Golang)**.
* Extensive hands\\-on experience designing, administering, and operating Kubernetes platforms, including cluster provisioning, configuration, upgrades, troubleshooting, and production operations.
* Strong experience running Kubernetes on public cloud platforms. Experience with **Google Cloud Platform (GCP****)**and **Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE)** is preferred; equivalent experience with AWS, Azure, or other public cloud platforms is also acceptable.
* Deep understanding of Kubernetes architecture and networking, including CNI plugins, ingress controllers, services, network policies, load balancing, traffic routing, and service connectivity.
* Experience with **Infrastructure as Code (****IaC****)** and Kubernetes deployment tools such as **Terraform**, **Helm**, and **Kustomize**.
* Experience implementing **GitOps** practices using tools such as **Argo CD** and/or **Flux**.
* Strong understanding of CI/CD automation and modern software delivery practices for Kubernetes platforms.
* Experience with observability solutions, including metrics, logging, monitoring, alerting, distributed tracing, and platform reliability.
* Experience administering Linux operating systems and optimizing container host environments.
* Experience with Kubernetes storage technologies, including CSI drivers, Persistent Volumes (PV), Persistent Volume Claims (PVC), Storage Classes, StatefulSets, and disaster recovery strategies.
* Strong automation\\-first mindset with experience managing infrastructure and platform services as code using version control, GitOps, and Infrastructure as Code practices.
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) and/or Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) certification is a plus.
**Responsibilities**

* Design, build, automate, and operate Kubernetes platform services across hybrid cloud and on\\-premises environments.
* Develop platform tooling, controllers, and automation using Go (Golang).
* Design, implement, and manage GitOps and CI/CD workflows to automate application and infrastructure deployments across multi\\-cluster Kubernetes environments.
* Manage, optimize, and scale Kubernetes clusters, including Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), and the supporting cloud infrastructure.
* Drive platform observability, reliability, security, resiliency, and operational excellence.
* Lead platform initiatives including Kubernetes upgrades, cluster migrations, networking enhancements, storage architecture, scalability improvements, and platform modernization.
* Define platform architecture, engineering standards, and long\\-term technical strategy.
* Partner with engineering teams to deliver secure, scalable, resilient, and self\\-service cloud\\-native platform capabilities.
* Serve as a technical subject matter expert, mentor engineers, and influence engineering best practices across teams.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional stakeholders to define platform roadmaps and balance product requirements with long\\-term platform sustainability.
**Preferred Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* 10\\+ years of experience in software engineering, cloud engineering, platform engineering, infrastructure engineering, or a related field.

* **Recent Blogs**

description:
India \\- Hyderabad

**ABOUT THE ROLE**


The Global Quality Analytics and Innovation team leads the digital transformation and innovation effort throughout Amgen’s Quality organization. We are at the forefront of developing and rolling out data\\-centric digital tools, employing automation, artificial intelligence (AI), and generative AI to drive end\\-to\\-end quality transformation. We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Data Scientist with a strong background in Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and MLOps, along with an understanding for Quality in regulated environments (e.g., GxP). This role will play a key part in designing, developing, and deploying scalable AI/ML solutions to drive innovation, efficiency, and regulatory compliance across the organization.


You will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams, including software engineers, data engineers, business stakeholders, and quality professionals to deliver AI\\-driven capabilities that support strategic business objectives. The ideal candidate is an analytical thinker with excellent technical depth, communication skills, and the ability to thrive in a fast\\-paced, agile environment.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, build, and deploy generative AI and LLM\\-based applications using frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, and others.
* Engineer reusable and effective prompts for LLMs like OpenAI GPT\\-4, Anthropic Claude, etc.
* Develop and maintain evaluation metrics and frameworks for prompt engineering.
* Conduct data quality assessments, data cleansing, and ingestion of unstructured documents into vector databases.
* Build retrieval algorithms for relevant data identification to support LLMs and AI applications.
* Ensure AI/ML development complies with GxP and other regulatory standards, fostering a strong Quality culture.
* Partner with global and local teams to support regulatory inspection readiness and future technological capabilities in AI.
* Share insights and findings with team members in an Agile (SAFe) environment.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Master’s degree and 2–4 years of experience in Software Engineering, Data Science, or ML Engineering
* Experience in developing and deploying LLM applications.
* Strong foundation in ML algorithms, data science workflows, and NLP.
* Expertise in Python and ML libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit\\-learn).
* Familiarity with MLOps tools (e.g., MLflow, CI/CD, version control).
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and tools like Spark, Databricks.

* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain complex topics to diverse audiences.
* High degree of initiative, self\\-motivation, and ability to work in global teams.

**Senior Engineering Manager – Finance Technology**

**(Accounts Payable – Freight \\& Intelligent Recovery Platforms)**

**About us**


Target is an iconic brand, a Fortune 50 company and one of America’s leading retailers. Target Technology Services is the behind\\-the\\-scenes powerhouse that fuels Target’s commitment to cutting\\-edge innovation—delivering incredible value to guests online and in stores through a strong technology framework and high\\-performing teams.


Every time a guest enters a Target store or browses Target.com, they experience the impact of Target’s investments in technology and innovation. We are the technologists behind one of the most loved retail brands, delivering joy to millions of our guests, team members, and communities.

**About Finance Technology**


Finance Technology powers the financial backbone of Target’s enterprise operations. Our platforms support critical capabilities across Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Revenue \\& Receivables, Vendor Income, Transportation Payments, Financial Controls, Treasury, and Enterprise Finance Modernization.


As Target continues to modernize its finance ecosystem, Finance Technology is focused on delivering intelligent, resilient, and scalable platforms powered by cloud\\-native architectures, AI\\-enabled workflows, event\\-driven systems, and modern engineering practices.


One of the focus area for this organization is transforming financial operations through modernization of freight payables capabilities and intelligent recovery platforms. This includes evolving freight payment and allocation capabilities into a unified Accounts Payable – Freight ecosystem while leveraging AI and agentic technologies to automate complex vendor income recovery workflows and improve financial outcomes across the enterprise.

**Job Description**


As a Senior Engineering Manager in Finance Technology, you will lead multiple engineering teams responsible for delivering business\\-critical financial platforms and modernization initiatives at enterprise scale.


You will be accountable for engineering strategy, execution, operational excellence, talent development, and technology modernization across a portfolio that includes Accounts Payable – Freight platforms, freight financial operations, and AI\\-powered Vendor Income Recovery solutions.


You will partner closely with Product Management, Finance business stakeholders, Principal Engineers, and Architecture teams to deliver solutions that drive measurable business value while maintaining high standards of reliability, security, scalability, and engineering excellence.


This role will play a critical part in shaping the future architecture of Finance Technology by modernizing freight financial systems, expanding intelligent automation capabilities, and enabling the next generation of finance operations powered by data, AI, and cloud\\-native platforms.

**Portfolio Responsibilities**


The teams within this portfolio support strategic finance capabilities including:

**Accounts Payable – Freight**


Lead engineering teams responsible for freight\\-related financial platforms that support freight payment authorization, freight allocations, transportation claims, and future freight payables modernization initiatives. These capabilities are foundational to the evolution of Target’s Accounts Payable architecture and future finance modernization strategy.

**Intelligent Vendor Income Recovery**


Lead engineering teams building AI\\-powered recovery solutions that identify vendor claim opportunities through analysis of enterprise communications, contracts, and supporting evidence. Leveraging GenAI, agentic workflows, and intelligent automation, these platforms help expand recovery coverage, improve operational efficiency, and reduce dependence on third\\-party recovery services.

**What You'll Do**

**Engineering Leadership \\& Delivery**

**About The Position**

title: Data Engineer
description:
Meet the Team
   

  

 The Customer Listening \\& Analytics team is part of Cisco’s Connected Engineering and Technology Organization (CETO) and operates as the data backbone for Cisco’s global customer experience measurement programs. We own the data infrastructure, transformation pipelines, and analytical frameworks that power NPS reporting, TAC performance analytics, executive business reviews, and customer health scoring—working at scale across Cisco’s global install base.
   

  

 Our India\\-based data engineering team is a core delivery engine, not a support function. Engineers here own production workstreams end\\-to\\-end and work in close collaboration with senior architects and analytics leads based in the US. The team operates on a modern data stack (Snowflake, dbt, Python, GCP) and is actively building toward an AI\\-augmented data platform aligned to Cisco’s enterprise AI transformation agenda.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

 As a Data Engineer on the Customer Listening team, you will own the development, maintenance, and continuous improvement of data pipelines and transformation models that serve executive\\-level analytics and AI\\-driven insight delivery. You will work within a well\\-architected Snowflake/dbt environment, contributing to data quality, pipeline reliability, and architectural evolution as the team scales its AI capabilities.
   

  

* Build and maintain dbt models supporting NPS measurement, TAC case analytics, EBV/EDW reconciliation, and PNPS computation—including incremental models, snapshot strategies, and macro\\-driven parametric configurations.
* Write production\\-grade SQL in Snowflake for multi\\-level hierarchy resolution (SAV → CAV → UNIFIED\\_PARTY\\_ID), complex aggregations, and pipeline performance optimization.
* Develop Python scripts for data ingestion, ELT automation, API payload processing, and lightweight data wrangling tasks within the Customer Listening pipeline ecosystem.
* Instrument pipelines with robust data quality frameworks—including dbt tests, row count assertions, null checks, and referential integrity validations—to ensure metric reliability for VP\\-level reporting.
* Collaborate with BI engineers on semantic model handoffs, diagnosing and resolving data\\-layer issues that manifest as reporting errors in Power BI.
* Support AI integration workstreams by building well\\-structured data layers that feed LLM\\-generated insight delivery pipelines (e.g., Dynamic NPS Forecast AI Summary).
* Contribute to the team’s AI future\\-readiness direction by evaluating and adopting AI\\-native data tooling including Snowflake Cortex, dbt Copilot, and related capabilities.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Objective, gate\\-level requirements. All five must be demonstrably met.**
* 4\\+ years of professional experience in data engineering, with demonstrated production ownership of Snowflake environments including schema design, query optimization, RBAC configuration, and cost governance.
* Intermediate to advanced dbt proficiency: authoring of incremental models, Jinja macros, snapshot strategies for slowly changing dimensions, generic and singular test frameworks, and dbt documentation practices.
* Expert\\-level SQL including window functions, recursive CTEs, lateral flattens, multi\\-level hierarchical aggregations, and query profiling in a cloud data warehouse setting.
* Intermediate Python proficiency for ELT scripting, data wrangling (pandas, numpy), and API payload ingestion—with the ability to build and maintain pipeline scripts independently.
* Demonstrated experience designing and rationalizing data models at enterprise scale, including dimensional modeling, object consolidation, and configuration\\-driven architecture patterns.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience integrating AI outputs into data pipelines—consuming LLM API responses as structured data, building tables that support AI summary generation workflows, or feature engineering for predictive analytics.
* Familiarity with AI\\-native data tooling such as Snowflake Cortex, dbt Copilot, or similar capabilities; awareness of where these tools add value and where human oversight remains essential.
* Working knowledge of Power BI semantic model consumption—sufficient to diagnose data\\-layer issues that surface as BI report errors and enable clean handoffs with BI engineering counterparts.
* Exposure to GCP services (Cloud Storage, Cloud Run, BigQuery, API Gateway) or Azure equivalents, with ability to integrate cloud\\-side outputs into a Snowflake\\-based pipeline.
* Git\\-based development discipline, pipeline orchestration experience (Airflow, Prefect, or dbt Cloud scheduling), and data observability practices (Great Expectations or equivalent).


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 Digital Solution Engineering Manager
   

  

  

  

  

  

**What We Believe In**
 ABB’s Process Automation business area enables customers to operate some of the world’s largest and most complex industrial infrastructures, helping them outrun – leaner and cleaner.
   

  

 We offer a broad range of automation, electrification and digital solutions for process, hybrid and maritime industries, including industry\\-specific integrated control and software as well as measurement and analytics solutions and services.
   

  

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 We are looking for data scientists with expertise to conceptualize, define and build industry specific digital solutions in our Automation Digital organization. The candidate should have a good foundation in statistic, machine learning and optimization theory and practice. He/she will develop machine learning models to define operation of industrial assets and manufacturing processes. He/she will also conceptualize and implement algorithms to solve process optimization and scheduling problem statements. He/she should be able to leverage not only open\\-source optimizers present in packages like SciPy Optimize, Google OR\\-Tools but also commercial optimizers like IBM CPLEX and Gurobi.
   

  

 Additionally, he/she will develop working prototypes for evaluation and customer demonstration. The candidate should leverage latest developments in AI/ML field with cross\\-functional industrial data and develop base algorithms for different asset health, process control and schedule optimization under time\\-variant operating profiles. The candidate is also expected to be familiar with solving various type of optimization problems like multi\\-objective optimization, Mixed Integer Linear / Nonlinear Programming, Quadratic Programming, Traveling Salesman Problem, Combinatorial Optimization, Constraint Programming, and Global Optimization. Exposure to meta\\-heuristic algorithms will add an edge to the profile.
   

  

 You will be mainly accountable for:
   

  

* Create scalable models and algorithms for integrating into proprietary tools and products.
* Analyze data, understand features, evaluate alternate models, validate hypothesis through theoretical and empirical approaches.
* Create statistical and predictive models for equipment monitoring, failure detection, life estimation and life extension.
* Conceptualize and develop process control and scheduling algorithms in the domain of industrial analytics.
* Solutionize optimization algorithms and their output visualizations by packaging them as industrial business value apps.
* Work closely with customers and Business Units (BUs) to architect and develop customer centric solutions tailored to their requirements.
* Practice agile development of digital solution ‘Proof of Concepts’ to effectively articulate the Customer Value Proposition.
* Provide industry specific domain insights for rich proposal responses by articulating customer value proposition.


**Location** 
 : Bengaluru, India
   

  

  

**Experience**
**Qualifications for the role**
* 4 to 8 years of overall work experience in development of optimization workflows applied to industrial analytics


 Academic
   

  

* PhD / M. Tech. / MS in either Statistics/ Operations Research/ Chemical/ Mechanical/ Electrical/ Aerospace Engineering


 Technology
   

  

* Extensive programming experience in one or more of the following languages: Python (preferred), R and Matlab.
* Experience with deep learning frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow is preferred.
* Familiarity with technologies like Docker, Kubernetes and MLflow is good to have.
* Experience in using standard optimization solvers like SciPy Optimize, Google OR\\-Tools and Matlab® Optimization toolbox.
* Agile development of customer centric prototypes / ‘Proof of Concepts’ for focused digital solutions.


 Domain
   

  

* Experience in development of optimization routines for process industries like petrochemicals, manufacturing, utilities etc.
* Familiarity with industrial equipment like multistage pumps and/or compressor, turbines, turbochargers, mechanical seals etc.
* Familiarity with control systems theory – state space formulations \\& Model Predictive Control.
* A deep understanding of optimization problem statements.
* Exposure to component/system modeling software platforms like Modelica and Simulink®.
* Beginner’s experience in software applications like MS Office will be considered an added advantage.


 Soft Skills
   

  

* Strong oral and written communication skills in English.
* Ability to interact with business and operation heads to articulate business value.


**More About Us**
 ABB is a leading global technology company that energizes the transformation of society and industry to achieve a more productive, sustainable future. The Process Automation (PA) business area (\\>$6B revenue in 2021, 22,000 employees), automates, electrifies and digitalizes some of the most complex industrial infrastructures on this planet. Through its five divisions, it serves customers in the energy, process and hybrid industries – from hydrocarbons, chemicals, water, mining, minerals, pulp \\& paper to marine and ports, and many more. PA stands at the heart of some of the most important shifts in society, helping the energy\\-intense industries to safer, smarter and more sustainable operations to enable a prosperous, low\\-carbon society.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

About the Role

Episeio Business Solutions is hiring **Data Scientists / Retail Analytics professionals at multiple levels** — from Junior Associate to Lead — on behalf of our client, a growing Retail Analytics practice. If you love working with retail data (sales, pricing, promotions, merchandising, and customer behaviour) and turning it into decisions that move the business, we want to hear from you.

Responsibilities scale with the level you're hired at:

**At every level**, you will:

* Work with retail data — sales, category performance, pricing, promotions, and customer metrics
* Write SQL queries to extract, validate, and analyze retail data
* Build or contribute to dashboards and reports (Power BI / Tableau / Excel)
* Support cohort analysis and customer segmentation

**As you move up the levels**, you'll take on:

* Independent ownership of analyses on promo effectiveness, pricing impact, and merchandising performance (Mid\\-Level)
* End\\-to\\-end ownership of the retail analytics strategy, KPI frameworks, dashboards governance, A/B testing, and mentoring of junior analysts (Senior/Lead)
* Direct collaboration with business heads across buying, marketing, operations, and technology, and architecting data tracking infrastructure (Senior/Lead)

**What We're Looking For (Must\\-Haves)**

* **Retail, eCommerce, or FMCG analytics experience is required** — this is non\\-negotiable across all levels
* Working knowledge of retail KPI frameworks: sales, basket size, conversion, retention, LTV
* SQL proficiency (junior: basic queries and joins → senior: advanced/complex queries)
* Familiarity with retail data sources: POS, CRM, digital/eCommerce platforms
* Comfort working with at least one BI tool (Power BI or Tableau) or strong Excel skills

* B.Tech / B.Sc in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field (MBA in Analytics/Marketing is a plus, especially for senior roles)

**Good to Have (Any Level)**

* Python or PySpark for data manipulation or statistical modelling
* Exposure to cloud data platforms (Azure Databricks, BigQuery)
* Understanding of A/B testing and statistical experimentation
* Experience with customer segmentation, RFM analysis, or product affinity/personalization modelling
* Familiarity with Jira or other project management tools

*(Additional experience with promo, pricing, and merchandising analytics, and experience mentoring analysts or building data infrastructure from scratch, is expected for Senior/Lead applicants.)*

**Why Join Us**

* Work on real retail business problems with direct business impact — not just reporting
* Clear growth path from Junior Associate to Analytics Lead within the same practice
* Exposure across the full retail value chain: pricing, promotions, merchandising, and customer analytics
* Collaborative, fast\\-paced analytics consulting environment based in Bangalore
* Recruitment managed by Episeio Business Solutions on behalf of the hiring company

**How to Apply**

Apply with your updated resume and briefly mention:

* Your total years of experience in **retail/eCommerce/FMCG analytics**
* Tools you're proficient in (SQL, Python, Power BI/Tableau, Excel)
* Which level you believe best fits your experience (Junior / Mid\\-Level / Senior\\-Lead)

Pay: ₹800,000\\.00 \\- ₹1,800,000\\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About Gradera**
 Gradera is an AI‑Native Services firm pioneering
 **Software‑Orchestrated Services™** 
 —a new enterprise transformation model where software orchestrates human expertise, digital workers, and enterprise systems to deliver governed, scalable outcomes. We help enterprises move beyond fragmented AI pilots, disconnected automation, and labor‑led models by redesigning how work gets done across operations, product, engineering, customer experience, data, and core workflows.
   

  

**Overview**
 We are seeking a highly analytical and curious
 **Data Scientist** 
 to transform complex, real\\-world data into meaningful insights and scalable machine learning solutions. In this role, you will work across the full data lifecycle—partnering with data engineering and business teams to explore, clean, and understand diverse datasets, and translating those insights into models, experiments, and data\\-driven recommendations.
   

  

 You will play a critical role in bridging raw data and business impact, developing a deep understanding of how data is generated, structured, and used. This includes conducting rigorous exploratory analysis, assessing data quality and lineage, and building robust analytical datasets that power advanced modeling and reporting.
   

  

 This role offers the opportunity to work with large\\-scale data platforms, cloud infrastructure, and modern machine learning frameworks, while contributing to impactful decision\\-making through experimentation, analytics, and self\\-service data tools.
   

  

**Role \\& Responsibilities**
* Collect, clean, and analyze large structured and unstructured datasets from multiple internal and external sources
* Conduct thorough exploratory data analysis (EDA) to understand data distributions, relationships, outliers, and missing value patterns
* Profile and audit datasets to assess data quality, completeness, consistency, and fitness for modeling
* Investigate and document data lineage — understanding where data originates, how it flows, and how it transforms across systems
* Identify and resolve data anomalies, inconsistencies, and integrity issues in collaboration with data engineering teams
* Develop a deep understanding of the business domain and the underlying data that represents it — including what each field means, how it is captured, and what its limitations are
* Translate raw, messy, real\\-world data into clean, well\\-understood analytical datasets ready for modeling and reporting
* Apply statistical techniques such as correlation analysis, hypothesis testing, variance analysis, and distribution fitting to extract meaningful signals from noise
* Build and deploy machine learning models including regression, classification, clustering, NLP, and time\\-series analysis
* Design, evaluate, and analyze A/B experiments and controlled tests using causal inference techniques
* Develop data\\-driven recommendations backed by rigorous statistical reasoning
* Write clean, production\\-ready code in Python or R
* Collaborate with data engineers to build reliable data pipelines and feature stores
* Deploy and monitor ML models using MLOps best practices on cloud infrastructure
* Build dashboards and self\\-serve analytics tools to support stakeholder decision\\-making


****Data Understanding \\& Analysis Skills****
* Strong ability to interrogate unfamiliar datasets and quickly develop a working understanding of their structure, semantics, and quirks
* Experience working with messy, incomplete, or poorly documented real\\-world data
* Skilled in identifying hidden patterns, trends, seasonality, and anomalies through visual and statistical exploration
* Ability to ask the right questions about data — challenging assumptions, validating sources, and understanding the context in which data was collected
* Proficiency in data profiling, descriptive statistics, and summary reporting to communicate the shape and health of a dataset
* Experience creating data dictionaries, documentation, and data quality reports to support team\\-wide data understanding
* Comfort working across structured (relational tables), semi\\-structured (JSON, XML), and unstructured (text, logs, sensor streams) data formats


**Technical Skills Required**
* Proficiency in Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit\\-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow) and/or R
* Strong SQL skills with hands\\-on experience in DB2 and SQL Server
* Experience with Databricks for large\\-scale data processing, feature engineering, and model training
* Familiarity with cloud platforms: Azure or AWS
* Experience with data warehouses and big data platforms (Databricks, Snowflake, or Redshift)
* Knowledge of MLOps tools such as MLflow, Kubeflow, or Airflow
* Experience with streaming data technologies such as Kafka or Spark
* Solid foundation in probability, statistics, linear algebra, and experimental design


****Nice to Have****
* Experience with deep learning, NLP, computer vision, or Bayesian methods
* Familiarity with real\\-time or streaming data pipelines
* Open\\-source contributions or published research

Responsible for analyzing strategic business objectives, utilizing statistical and mathematical programming techniques for machine learning and predictive analytics, developing and implementing algorithms and models, applying natural language processing, designing network simulation models, developing automated solutions, prototyping applications, managing projects, and communicating complex findings as a Data Scientist.
   

  

 Experience: 3–6 Years
   

  

 Location: Hyderabad, India (In‑office)
   

  

 Employment Type: Full Time
   

  

 Worker Sub‑Type: Regular
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Data Scientist II is a hands‑on contributor responsible for delivering applied data science, advanced analytics, and machine learning solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) for FedEx Office data applications.
   

  

 This role focuses on executing data science solutions that drive business outcomes, working closely with data engineers, software engineers, and business stakeholders.
   

  

 The role emphasizes practical, production‑oriented data science rather than pure research.
   

  

 The Data Scientist II may occasionally support data engineering activities to enable ML pipelines and ensure data readiness, while continuously building depth in modeling, analytics, and ML deployment.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Understand business problems and translate them into data science and analytics use cases.
* Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and feature engineering on large, complex datasets.
* Build, train, and evaluate statistical and machine learning models (descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive).
* Apply appropriate modeling techniques to generate actionable insights and recommendations.
* Support model deployment and lifecycle management using Vertex AI, following established patterns.
* Collaborate with data engineers to ensure high‑quality, ML‑ready datasets.
* Write production‑quality Python and SQL for data preparation, transformations, and feature pipelines.
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and medium‑scale deployments.
* Follow and contribute to data science standards, reusable templates, and best practices.
* Work closely with cross‑functional teams (IT, business, analytics, engineering) in an Agile environment.
* Assist with troubleshooting data or model issues in production under guidance.
* Continuously learn and apply emerging data science and ML techniques in a business‑focused manner.


 GCP Technology Stack
   

  

* Programming: Python, SQL
* GCP Analytics: BigQuery, Cloud Storage
* AI/ML: Vertex AI (model training, deployment, monitoring – working knowledge)
* ML Libraries: scikit‑learn, XGBoost, TensorFlow or PyTorch (as applicable)
* DevOps / MLOps: Git, CI/CD (foundational exposure)
* BI / Visualization: Power BI or Looker


 Skills \\& Qualities
   

  

* Strong foundation in data science, statistics, and machine learning concepts
* Experience delivering applied analytics or ML solutions in real‑world environments
* Ability to work across data science and light data engineering tasks
* Engineering mindset with focus on code quality and reproducibility
* Strong analytical thinking and structured problem‑solving skills
* Effective communication and collaboration with cross‑functional teams
* Willingness to learn, adapt, and grow toward more complex data science ownership


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, or a related field
* Typically 3–5 years of relevant experience in data science, analytics, or ML roles
* Experience supporting end‑to‑end analytical or ML workflows, from data exploration to production deployment


 Education: Master’s degree or equivalent in Computer Science, MIS, Mathematics, Statistics, or similar discipline.
   

  

 Relevant work experience as a data scientist based on the following number of years:
   

  

 Standard I: Two (2\\) years
   

  

 Standard II: Three (3\\) years
   

  

 Senior I: Four (4\\) years
   

  

 Senior II: Five (5\\) years
   

  

**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Fluency in English
* Analytical Skills
* Accuracy \\& Attention to Detail
* Numerical Skills
* Planning \\& Organizing Skills
* Presentation Skills
* Statistical and Mathematical Knowledge
* Data Modeling and Visualization Skills
* Programming Skills

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People\\-Service\\-Profit philosophy (P\\-S\\-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. We care for their well\\-being, and value their contributions to the company.

title: Data Scientist II, Forecasting, Demand Planning and Workforce Intelligence
description:
**Description**
 Amazon Customer and Partner Trust (CPT) team's mission is to make Amazon the safest and most trusted place worldwide to transact online. Amazon runs one of the most dynamic e\\-commerce marketplaces in the world, with nearly 2 million sellers worldwide selling hundreds of millions of items in ten countries. CPT safeguards every financial transaction across all Amazon sites. As such, CPT designs and builds the software systems, risk models and operational processes that minimize risk and maximize trust in Amazon.com. CPT organization is looking for a Data Scientist for its Demand Planning and Workforce Intelligence (DPWI) team. The team is being grown to provide insights about its CPT planning and provide analytical solutions to help drive operational efficiencies, uncover the hidden risks and trends, reduce investigation errors and bad debt, improve customer experience and predict \\& recommend the optimizations for future state of SPS operations.
   

  

 As a Data Scientist, you will be responsible for modeling complex problems, discovering insights and identifying opportunities through the use of statistical, machine learning, algorithmic, data mining and visualization techniques. You will need to collaborate effectively with internal stakeholders and cross\\-functional teams to solve problems, create operational efficiencies, and deliver successfully against high organizational standards. The candidate should be able to apply a breadth of tools, data sources and analytical techniques to answer a wide range of high\\-impact business questions and present the insights in concise and effective manner. Additionally, the candidate should be an effective communicator capable of independently driving issues to resolution and communicating insights to non\\-technical audiences. This is a high impact role with goals that directly impacts the bottom line of the business.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Use machine learning techniques to forecast SPS investigations for improved long term and short term capacity planning.
* Employ the appropriate algorithms to discover patterns of risks, abuse and help reduce bad debt.
* Design experiments, test hypotheses, and build actionable models to optimize CPT operations.
* Solve analytical problems, and effectively communicate methodologies and results.
* Build predictive models to forecast risks for product launches and operations and help predict workflow and capacity requirements for CPT operations.
* Draw inferences and conclusions, and create dashboards and visualizations of processed data, identify trends, anomalies.
* Work closely with internal stakeholders such as business teams, engineering teams, and partner teams and align them with respect to your focus area


**About The Team**

title: Director, Software Engineering - Data Platform, Hyderabad
description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***

**Who We Are…**

When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the *storytellers* bringing our characters to life, the *creators* bringing them to your living rooms and the *dreamers* creating what’s next…


From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.

**Director****, Software****Engineering \\- Data Platform, Hyderabad**

**About Warner Bros. Discovery:**


Warner Bros. Discovery, a premier global media and entertainment company, offers audiences the world's most differentiated and complete portfolio of content, brands and franchises across television, film, streaming and gaming. The new company combines Warner Media’s premium entertainment, sports and news assets with Discovery's leading non\\-fiction and international entertainment and sports businesses.


For more information, please visit www.wbd.com

**Meet our Team:**


The Data Platform team at Warner Bros. Discovery powers data\\-driven experiences across global products like Max, Discovery\\+, Sports, Studios, and News. The team builds and operates a scalable, multi\\-tenant data ecosystem that enables analytics, real\\-time insights, and machine learning use cases across the organization. Positioned at the core of the data journey, the team is responsible for ingesting, processing, and transforming large volumes of client and server\\-side data into reliable and high\\-quality datasets. Operating at the intersection of data and platform engineering, the team focuses on building robust pipelines, ensuring data quality and governance, and driving innovation in real\\-time processing, observability, and modern data infrastructure. The team collaborates closely with product, analytics, and engineering stakeholders to enable data\\-driven decision\\-making at scale.

**Role Summary**

* Warner Bros. Discovery is looking for a Director of Engineering to lead critical Data Platform capabilities across data infrastructure, data processing, self\\-service enablement, governance, metadata, access, reliability, and operational excellence.
* This is a senior engineering leadership role for a leader who can manage engineering managers and senior technical teams, drive platform strategy, improve execution discipline, and operate large\\-scale systems with strong reliability and cost awareness.
* The role does not require deep expertise in one specific technology or deep machine learning specialization. However, the candidate must be well versed in modern data platform concepts, distributed systems, cloud platforms, engineering operations, and enterprise\\-grade governance.
**Role Scope**

* Lead engineering teams responsible for foundational Data Platform capabilities used across analytics, data engineering, business intelligence, operational workflows, and AI/ML enablement.
* Own execution across platform infrastructure, data collection, batch and streaming data processing, metadata, access governance, FinOps, observability, and self\\-service platform capabilities.
* Drive platform maturity with a focus on reliability, automation, governance, developer experience, security, cost efficiency, and operational readiness.
* Partner closely with engineering, product, program management, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, and business stakeholders.
**Key Responsibilities**

**Engineering Leadership**

* Lead multiple engineering teams and managers responsible for critical Data Platform services.
* Build a strong engineering culture focused on ownership, customer impact, reliability, inclusion, and high standards.
* Coach managers and senior engineers to improve technical judgment, execution quality, stakeholder communication, and operational discipline.
* Create clear operating mechanisms for roadmap planning, prioritization, delivery tracking, risk management, and leadership updates.
* Hire, develop, and retain strong engineering managers, staff engineers, senior engineers, and emerging technical leaders.
**Platform Strategy and Delivery**

* Translate business and platform strategy into clear engineering roadmaps, milestones, and measurable outcomes.
* Drive modernization of data platform capabilities across storage, compute, orchestration, ingestion, access, metadata, governance, and self\\-service workflows.
* Balance near\\-term delivery needs with long\\-term architecture quality, operational simplicity, and cost efficiency.
* Partner with peer leaders to align priorities across overlapping platform workstreams and reduce duplication of effort.
* Ensure platform investments improve developer productivity, data trust, business velocity, governance, and operational scale.
**Operational Excellence**

* Establish strong operational practices across owned systems, including SLIs/SLOs, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, incident response, RCAs/COEs, and post\\-incident learning.
* Improve alert quality, reduce manual toil, and increase automation across platform operations.
* Ensure major launches have clear readiness criteria, monitoring, rollback strategy, ownership, support model, and communication plan.
* Drive a culture of proactive reliability engineering, cost\\-aware design, and continuous improvement.
* Partner with operational tooling and platform teams to improve observability, cost transparency, anomaly detection, and self\\-service support.
**Governance, Metadata, and Data Trust**

* Ensure platform systems support secure, compliant, and auditable access to data.
* Drive adoption of metadata, lineage, ownership, classification, data quality, access review, and lifecycle management practices.
* Improve the discoverability and trustworthiness of data assets through cataloging, documentation, schema management, and data product standards.
* Partner with governance, privacy, and security stakeholders to embed controls into platform workflows rather than treating them as manual afterthoughts.
**Self\\-Service and Developer Experience**

* Lead initiatives that reduce manual engineering dependency through self\\-service onboarding, automated access workflows, reusable templates, and standard platform patterns.
* Improve developer experience for teams building, deploying, operating, and governing data products.
* Create consistent platform standards that help teams move faster while staying within reliability, privacy, security, and cost guardrails.
**Cross\\-Functional Collaboration**

* Work closely with product, TPM, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, finance, and business teams.
* Drive alignment on roadmap priorities, launch readiness, ownership boundaries, operational support, and business impact.
* Represent Data Platform in architecture reviews, roadmap discussions, leadership forums, and executive updates.
* Communicate complex platform topics in a clear, practical, and outcome\\-focused manner.
**Required Qualifications**

* 15\\+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* 5\\+ years of experience leading engineering managers and large engineering teams.
* Experience operating large\\-scale distributed systems, data platforms, cloud platforms, or infrastructure platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern data platform concepts such as batch and stream processing, data lakehouse architecture, metadata, governance, access control, orchestration, observability, and cost management.
* Proven ability to lead platform programs across multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Strong operational excellence mindset, including incident management, monitoring, SLOs, runbooks, RCA/COE practices, and production readiness.
* Experience driving self\\-service platforms, automation, developer productivity, and scalable engineering workflows.
* Ability to make sound technical trade\\-offs without needing to be the deepest expert in every technology.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex topics for senior leadership and cross\\-functional partners.
* Proven track record of hiring, coaching, and developing managers and senior technical talent.
* Experience working in Agile or continuous delivery engineering environments.
**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with large\\-scale data platforms using technologies such as Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Flink, Kafka, Airflow, Apache Iceberg, Spark, Kubernetes, AWS, or similar platforms.
* Experience with metadata, catalog, lineage, governance, and data quality platforms such as DataHub, Unity Catalog, Monte Carlo, or similar tools.
* Experience with FinOps, cloud cost optimization, and cost attribution for large\\-scale data workloads.
* Exposure to AI/ML or GenAI platform enablement, including governance, observability, model or prompt lifecycle, or data readiness for AI use cases.
* Experience leading platform migrations, modernization, or vendor\\-lock\\-in reduction efforts.
* Experience supporting data products, semantic layers, data certification, and self\\-service onboarding.
* Experience working in media, streaming, advertising, consumer product, or high\\-scale digital platform environments.
**What Success Looks Like**

* Engineering teams deliver faster with clearer ownership, stronger execution discipline, and fewer escalations.
* Platform capabilities become easier for internal teams to adopt through self\\-service workflows, automation, and clear standards.
* Production reliability improves through stronger monitoring, runbooks, launch readiness, and incident learning.
* Data assets become easier to discover, trust, govern, and operate.
* Platform costs become more visible, attributable, and actively optimized.
* Cross\\-team launches have better readiness, rollback planning, and stakeholder alignment.
* Engineering managers and senior engineers grow into stronger leaders.
**What we offer**

* A Great Place to work
* Equal opportunity employer
* Fast track growth opportunities

**Director****, Software****Engineering \\- Data Platform, Hyderabad**

**About Warner Bros. Discovery:**


Warner Bros. Discovery, a premier global media and entertainment company, offers audiences the world's most differentiated and complete portfolio of content, brands and franchises across television, film, streaming and gaming. The new company combines Warner Media’s premium entertainment, sports and news assets with Discovery's leading non\\-fiction and international entertainment and sports businesses.


For more information, please visit www.wbd.com

**Meet our Team:**


The Data Platform team at Warner Bros. Discovery powers data\\-driven experiences across global products like Max, Discovery\\+, Sports, Studios, and News. The team builds and operates a scalable, multi\\-tenant data ecosystem that enables analytics, real\\-time insights, and machine learning use cases across the organization. Positioned at the core of the data journey, the team is responsible for ingesting, processing, and transforming large volumes of client and server\\-side data into reliable and high\\-quality datasets. Operating at the intersection of data and platform engineering, the team focuses on building robust pipelines, ensuring data quality and governance, and driving innovation in real\\-time processing, observability, and modern data infrastructure. The team collaborates closely with product, analytics, and engineering stakeholders to enable data\\-driven decision\\-making at scale.

**Role Summary**

* Warner Bros. Discovery is looking for a Director of Engineering to lead critical Data Platform capabilities across data infrastructure, data processing, self\\-service enablement, governance, metadata, access, reliability, and operational excellence.
* This is a senior engineering leadership role for a leader who can manage engineering managers and senior technical teams, drive platform strategy, improve execution discipline, and operate large\\-scale systems with strong reliability and cost awareness.
* The role does not require deep expertise in one specific technology or deep machine learning specialization. However, the candidate must be well versed in modern data platform concepts, distributed systems, cloud platforms, engineering operations, and enterprise\\-grade governance.
**Role Scope**

* Lead engineering teams responsible for foundational Data Platform capabilities used across analytics, data engineering, business intelligence, operational workflows, and AI/ML enablement.
* Own execution across platform infrastructure, data collection, batch and streaming data processing, metadata, access governance, FinOps, observability, and self\\-service platform capabilities.
* Drive platform maturity with a focus on reliability, automation, governance, developer experience, security, cost efficiency, and operational readiness.
* Partner closely with engineering, product, program management, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, and business stakeholders.
**Key Responsibilities**

**Engineering Leadership**

* Lead multiple engineering teams and managers responsible for critical Data Platform services.
* Build a strong engineering culture focused on ownership, customer impact, reliability, inclusion, and high standards.
* Coach managers and senior engineers to improve technical judgment, execution quality, stakeholder communication, and operational discipline.
* Create clear operating mechanisms for roadmap planning, prioritization, delivery tracking, risk management, and leadership updates.
* Hire, develop, and retain strong engineering managers, staff engineers, senior engineers, and emerging technical leaders.
**Platform Strategy and Delivery**

* Translate business and platform strategy into clear engineering roadmaps, milestones, and measurable outcomes.
* Drive modernization of data platform capabilities across storage, compute, orchestration, ingestion, access, metadata, governance, and self\\-service workflows.
* Balance near\\-term delivery needs with long\\-term architecture quality, operational simplicity, and cost efficiency.
* Partner with peer leaders to align priorities across overlapping platform workstreams and reduce duplication of effort.
* Ensure platform investments improve developer productivity, data trust, business velocity, governance, and operational scale.
**Operational Excellence**

* Establish strong operational practices across owned systems, including SLIs/SLOs, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, incident response, RCAs/COEs, and post\\-incident learning.
* Improve alert quality, reduce manual toil, and increase automation across platform operations.
* Ensure major launches have clear readiness criteria, monitoring, rollback strategy, ownership, support model, and communication plan.
* Drive a culture of proactive reliability engineering, cost\\-aware design, and continuous improvement.
* Partner with operational tooling and platform teams to improve observability, cost transparency, anomaly detection, and self\\-service support.
**Governance, Metadata, and Data Trust**

* Ensure platform systems support secure, compliant, and auditable access to data.
* Drive adoption of metadata, lineage, ownership, classification, data quality, access review, and lifecycle management practices.
* Improve the discoverability and trustworthiness of data assets through cataloging, documentation, schema management, and data product standards.
* Partner with governance, privacy, and security stakeholders to embed controls into platform workflows rather than treating them as manual afterthoughts.
**Self\\-Service and Developer Experience**

* Lead initiatives that reduce manual engineering dependency through self\\-service onboarding, automated access workflows, reusable templates, and standard platform patterns.
* Improve developer experience for teams building, deploying, operating, and governing data products.
* Create consistent platform standards that help teams move faster while staying within reliability, privacy, security, and cost guardrails.
**Cross\\-Functional Collaboration**

* Work closely with product, TPM, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, finance, and business teams.
* Drive alignment on roadmap priorities, launch readiness, ownership boundaries, operational support, and business impact.
* Represent Data Platform in architecture reviews, roadmap discussions, leadership forums, and executive updates.
* Communicate complex platform topics in a clear, practical, and outcome\\-focused manner.
**Required Qualifications**

* 15\\+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* 5\\+ years of experience leading engineering managers and large engineering teams.
* Experience operating large\\-scale distributed systems, data platforms, cloud platforms, or infrastructure platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern data platform concepts such as batch and stream processing, data lakehouse architecture, metadata, governance, access control, orchestration, observability, and cost management.
* Proven ability to lead platform programs across multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Strong operational excellence mindset, including incident management, monitoring, SLOs, runbooks, RCA/COE practices, and production readiness.
* Experience driving self\\-service platforms, automation, developer productivity, and scalable engineering workflows.
* Ability to make sound technical trade\\-offs without needing to be the deepest expert in every technology.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex topics for senior leadership and cross\\-functional partners.
* Proven track record of hiring, coaching, and developing managers and senior technical talent.
* Experience working in Agile or continuous delivery engineering environments.
**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with large\\-scale data platforms using technologies such as Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Flink, Kafka, Airflow, Apache Iceberg, Spark, Kubernetes, AWS, or similar platforms.
* Experience with metadata, catalog, lineage, governance, and data quality platforms such as DataHub, Unity Catalog, Monte Carlo, or similar tools.
* Experience with FinOps, cloud cost optimization, and cost attribution for large\\-scale data workloads.
* Exposure to AI/ML or GenAI platform enablement, including governance, observability, model or prompt lifecycle, or data readiness for AI use cases.
* Experience leading platform migrations, modernization, or vendor\\-lock\\-in reduction efforts.
* Experience supporting data products, semantic layers, data certification, and self\\-service onboarding.
* Experience working in media, streaming, advertising, consumer product, or high\\-scale digital platform environments.
**What Success Looks Like**

* Engineering teams deliver faster with clearer ownership, stronger execution discipline, and fewer escalations.
* Platform capabilities become easier for internal teams to adopt through self\\-service workflows, automation, and clear standards.
* Production reliability improves through stronger monitoring, runbooks, launch readiness, and incident learning.
* Data assets become easier to discover, trust, govern, and operate.
* Platform costs become more visible, attributable, and actively optimized.
* Cross\\-team launches have better readiness, rollback planning, and stakeholder alignment.
* Engineering managers and senior engineers grow into stronger leaders.
**What we offer**

* A Great Place to work
* Equal opportunity employer
* Fast track growth opportunities
**How We Get Things Done…**


This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding\\-principles/ along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.

**Championing Inclusion at WBD**


Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our accessibility page for instructions to submit your request.

As a Lead Infrastructure Engineer at JPMorgan Chase in Infrastructure Platforms, you will partner with customers and global technologists to manage production incidents, problems, and changes; drive communications and lifecycle management; and support product evolution.
